CustomField.defaultValue: IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Thailand') , 'Hisense Thailand', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Indonesia') , 'Hisense Indonesia', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Vietnam') , 'Hisense Vietnam', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Malaysia') , ' Hisense Malaysia', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Philippines') , 'Hisense Philippines','') ))))
CustomField.label: Sales Region
